_notes.purpose: Corridor-level layer for Vietnam → United States export-import scenarios with no commodity override. Iteration-4 deliverable. Mirrors india-us.json: carries the Fed-path inputs (importer = US side, so identical to india-us.json) and the sovereign spread inputs (exporter = VN side, BB+ S&P rating).
_notes.merge_position: Middle. Loaded by profile_resolver after export-import/_base.json and before any commodity leaf. Inherits the 4-component skeleton, stress_timing, tenor_grid, loan_spread_default, mode, and dispatch from _base; merges these inputs on top.
_notes.source_of_values: FED_PATH is identical to india-us.json (US-side Fed-path is corridor-independent for any X-to-US trade). Sovereign spread is anchored on S&P's BB+ Local Currency LT rating affirmed for Vietnam (June 28 2025, stable outlook; cbonds.com news 3471799, Reuters/HL coverage Sept 2025). Spread basis 100bps base / 140bps peak is doubled from the V1 India-BBB anchor (50/70bps) to reflect the BB+ vs BBB ratings-ladder gap and the speculative-grade boundary crossing.
_notes.iter4_demo_choice: Iteration 4 holds tariff inputs IDENTICAL to india-us-textiles in the commodity leaf so that the ONLY corridor-level differentiator visible in resolved A/B/C is the sovereign spread. This is the cleanest expression of the 'any corridor without code changes' thesis (design-v1-iteration-plan.md Iteration 4). Corridor-specific tariff sourcing lands in Iteration 9 alongside live tariff binding.
_notes.methodology_placeholder: 100bps / 140bps is a methodology placeholder pending Iteration-9 live CDS or sovereign-spread API binding.

source.note: Identical to india-us.json: importer = US in both corridors, so the Fed-path is shared. corridor-references file scaffolded in Iteration 2+; until populated, values live here.

source.citation: S&P BB+ Local Currency LT (affirmed June 28 2025, stable outlook; cbonds.com news 3471799, Reuters/HL coverage Sept 2025). One notch below investment grade (BBB-). Spread basis 100bps base / 140bps peak = 2x the V1 India-BBB anchor (50/70bps) to reflect the BB+ vs BBB ratings-ladder gap and the speculative-grade boundary crossing. Methodology placeholder pending Iteration-9 live CDS binding.
